title: Bad Weather
description: Bad Weather transforms Minecraft with extreme storms, performance boosts, immersive sounds, shaders, and detailed maps — survive nature’s wrath in style
body:
Bad Weather is a NeoForge 1.21.1 modpack built for storm chasers and survivalists alike. Centered on ProtoManly's Weather Mod with its radar overhaul, EAS alerts, shaders, and villagers taking cover, this pack makes the skies truly dangerous. Performance mods like FerriteCore, Lithium, ImmediatelyFast, Sodium, and Iris Shaders ensure smooth gameplay even in the harshest conditions.

Explore the enhanced world with Xaero's Minimap and World Map, enjoy atmospheric depth with AmbientSounds and Subtle Effects, and track your survival with AppleSkin and BetterF3. Visual polish comes from Fresh Animations, Fresh Moves, 3D Skin Layers, and Not Enough Animations, while William Wythers' Overhauled Overworld reshapes terrain for breathtaking vistas.

With voice chat support, shader compatibility, and a refined mod menu, Bad Weather combines danger, beauty, and performance into one immersive experience. Whether you’re chasing tornadoes or hiding from them, this pack delivers a thrilling, storm-filled Minecraft adventure.

If you enjoy what I do, consider supporting me on Ko-fi! Every little bit means the world! https://ko-fi.com/pug116
